summary: Ranging markets with strong undercurrents. Gold at ATH ($4,819), silver consolidating after failed $83 breakout ($79.84). BTC healthy on-chain (MVRV 1.37, SOPR 1.00) but needs $77.5K breakout. ETH facing DeFi contagion from $292M KelpDAO exploit. Oil binary risk from fragile US-Iran ceasefire. Easter Monday thin liquidity. System correctly holding — no high-conviction entries identified.

trade_ideas.rationale: Silver at $79.84, above key support ($77.50). 5th consecutive supply deficit. G/S ratio compression thesis intact. Algorithmic models forecast $88.92 by Apr 23. Wait for retest of $83 breakout level with volume.
ATH territory, 9B/0S consensus (strongest signal today). JPM target $5,055 Q4. Central bank buying unabated. COT increasingly bullish. Safe-haven bid from Iran crisis.

On-chain healthy (MVRV 1.37, NUPL 0.65 belief). ETF inflows $18.7B YTD. MSTR accumulating aggressively. Fear at 29 (contrarian bullish). Post-halving cycle says Q2 is breakout window. BUT: needs $77.5K confirmation.

Easter Monday: thin liquidity in European metals. Amplified moves possible.

System has been HOLD for 20 consecutive sessions — appropriate for ranging/low-conviction.
